sessions.details: recorded 1979-02-05 for John Peel (Session #3). First TX 1979-03-05.
recorded 1971-06-10 for Sounds Of The Seventies (Alan Black). First TX 1971-06-25

track_listing.track: ‘You Can't Keep A Good Man Down’ (7") (Decca)
‘Tryouts For The Human Race’ (LP-Number One In Heaven) (Virgin)
‘Ramblin' Man’ (2xLP-Wipe The Windows, Check The Oil, Dollar Gas) (Capricorn)
‘All You Need Is Love’ (LP-Magical Mystery Tour) (Parlophone)

Hi there, this is Tommy Vance. Welcome to the Friday Rock Show.
Tonight our sessions feature Eddie and the Hot Rods, the latest by them.
And from way back in 1971, four ace numbers by Van de Graaff Generator.
